stemHtml:
Based on the following information, what is the minimum block fuel required for a Commercial Air Transport flight with a Performance Class A aircraft using the Basic Fuel Scheme without any modifications?

Taxi Fuel: 300 kg
Trip fuel: 85 000 kg
Contingency fuel: 500 kg for 5 minutes
Final reserve fuel: 3000 kg
Alternate fuel: 5500 kg
Fuel tankering: 1500 kg
